block_00: Card chhaviyan asvikrit kar di gai
block_01: Durbhaagy se, aapke dvaara submit ki gayi debit/credit card partiyon ko asvikaar kar diya gaya tha kyonki ve black and white the. Kripya neeche diye gaye link ke madhyam se card chhaviyon ki nayi aur rangeen partiyan upload karen.
block_03: Hum aapke sahyog aur samajh ki saraahana karte hain.
block_06: ko aapke prashnon ka jawab dene me khushi hogi.
